creator: twm@pdp11.pw
text:
Created attachment 224905
Update to 0.11.9

net-im/prosody: Update to 0.11.9

* Update to 0.11.9

Changelog:

  https://blog.prosody.im/prosody-0.11.9-released/
  https://prosody.im/security/advisory_20210512/

QA:

  * portlint: OK (1 warning regarding the use of /var/db)
  * testport: OK (poudriere: 11.4 & 12.2, i386 & amd64;
                  13.0, amd64 & arm64)

This release fixes a number of security issues. An update from
earlier versions is highly recommended. Please see the linked
security advisory for detailed information.
